# hetzner_vswitch_server (Resource)

Manages the association of a server to a Hetzner vSwitch.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Attaches a server to a vSwitch.
resource "hetzner_vswitch_server" "example" {
  vswitch_id    = hetzner_vswitch.example.id
  server_number = 12345
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) The server number to connect to the vSwitch.
- `vswitch_id` (Number) The vSwitch ID.

### Read-Only

- `status` (String) The connection status (ready, in process, or failed).
